description: Priority 4 continued: Voice-to-text care notes and SBAR handover - Frontend pages for voice input on care notes and SBAR handover generation/viewing. Uses Web Speech API (browser native) for voice-to-text on the frontend.
steps: Add TypeScript types to frontend/src/types/index.ts: VoiceTranscription (id, user_id, resident_id, audio_duration_seconds, transcription_text, confidence_score, care_note_id, status, created_at), SbarHandover (id, generated_by_name, shift_date, shift_type, situation, background, assessment, recommendation, residents_covered, key_concerns, status, approved_by_name, approved_at, created_at).
Add API client methods to frontend/src/services/api.ts: voiceApi object with transcribe, createNoteFromVoice, getHistory; sbarApi object with generate, list, get, approve.
Add React Query hooks to frontend/src/hooks/index.ts: useVoiceHistory, useCreateNoteFromVoice, useSbarHandovers, useGenerateSbar, useApproveSbar.

Create frontend/src/components/VoiceNoteInput.tsx: A reusable component that uses the Web Speech API (window.webkitSpeechRecognition or SpeechRecognition) for real-time voice-to-text. Shows a microphone button, live transcription text, and a 'Create Note' button. When 'Create Note' is pressed, calls the voice/create-note endpoint to AI-clean the text and create the care note. Include visual recording indicator (pulsing red dot) and waveform-style animation (CSS-only). Falls back to a textarea if Speech API not available.

Create frontend/src/pages/SbarHandover.tsx: A page with (1) Generate section - select shift date and shift type (day/evening/night), click generate to create SBAR handover. (2) Recent Handovers list - cards showing date, shift, status, with expand to see full SBAR sections. (3) Detail view - when a handover is selected, show the 4 SBAR sections (Situation, Background, Assessment, Recommendation) in styled cards with clear headers. Include 'Approve' button for managers. Follow existing inline-style patterns.

Integrate VoiceNoteInput into the existing CareNotes page (frontend/src/pages/CareNotes.tsx): Add a 'Voice Note' button/toggle that shows the VoiceNoteInput component above or beside the existing text note form.

Register SbarHandover page in frontend/src/App.tsx: (1) Add import. (2) Add nav item in NAV_ALL under 'Tools' section: { path: '/sbar-handover', label: 'SBAR Handover', icon: '📋', roles: ['home_manager','deputy_manager','registered_nurse','senior_carer','super_admin','group_admin'] }. (3) Add Route.
acceptance_criteria: VoiceNoteInput component renders with microphone button and uses Web Speech API
SbarHandover page has generate, list, and detail views
Voice note button integrated into CareNotes page
Nav item and route for SBAR Handover registered
Frontend builds successfully with npm run build
